title: rhododendron × rovellii
intro: Rhododendron × rovellii, also known as the Rovelli's rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron × rovellii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
